description:
A collection of utilities bringing back classic features to Windows.


What's Changed
- Fix search auto-selecting wrong item before programs finish loading by @nnyj in https://github.com/Open-Shell/Open-Shell-Menu/pull/2451
- Update font face names in Japanese localization by @coolvitto in https://github.com/Open-Shell/Open-Shell-Menu/pull/2409
- Fix open/save file dialog getting stuck after Windows 11 update by @ge0rdi in https://github.com/Open-Shell/Open-Shell-Menu/pull/2457
New Contributors
- @nnyj made their first contribution in https://github.com/Open-Shell/Open-Shell-Menu/pull/2451
- @coolvitto made their first contribution in https://github.com/Open-Shell/Open-Shell-Menu/pull/2409
Full Changelog: https://github.com/Open-Shell/Open-Shell-Menu/compare/v4.4.197...v4.4.198
